title: Chapter 4
text: AUTHOR NOTE Hello reader friend, If you haven’t read my books before, you might not know this, but I write darker stories that can be upsetting and disturbing. My books and main characters aren't for the faint of heart. Killian Carson, the main character of God of Malice is a true psychopath, not a make-believe, nor a bad boy who’s eventually tamed. He’s a villain with very questionable actions, so if you can’t handle morally black characters, please do NOT proceed. This book contains non-con, dub-con, and suicidal thoughts. I trust you know your triggers before you proceed. God of Malice is a complete STANDALONE. For more things Rina Kent, visit www.rinakent.com
